accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the 2016 Commission Act and other context are accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the request to authorize displays launching the 250th anniversary celebrations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The resolution is a non-binding request and does not amend or repeal existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Correctly notes the measure is a request, not a mandate, and creates no new legal authority.

effective_dates.why: Accurately states the December 31, 2025 through January 5, 2026 display period and five nights.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both operative requests: the display authorization and transmittal by the Clerk.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

concise.why: Appropriately concise without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Secretary of the Interior, Clerk of the House, and Semiquincentennial Commission.

correct_figures.why: Dates, five nights, and legislative history figures all match the bill text.
